name: Platform Engineer Pack
description: Workflows for infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, container operations, observability setup, monorepo tooling, and reliability engineering.
useCases: Build and maintain CI/CD, infrastructure, and developer tooling for local coding-agent workflows.
Review platform changes for reliability, security, cost, operability, and rollback readiness.
Create observability, alerting, and runbook improvements for services and shared infrastructure.
Plan migrations across monorepos, build systems, containers, and infrastructure-as-code.
examplePrompts: Improve this CI/CD pipeline with faster feedback, stronger quality gates, and clear failure output.
Review this infrastructure change for security, reliability, cost, drift, and rollback risk.
Create an observability and alerting plan for this service, including dashboards and runbooks.
Plan this platform migration with dependency mapping, rollout phases, validation, and fallback.
